diagnosis: The logs explicitly show a clear system error during the processing of invoice INV-98774 by the InvoiceProcessing_Performer bot. The error message is 'Get TaxAmount (crashes — key missing): The given key was not present in the dictionary.' This error occurs in CalculateInvoiceTotals.xaml at Assign 'Get TaxAmount (crashes — key missing)' — the SpecificContent dictionary of the queue item does not contain the key TaxAmount, causing a KeyNotFoundException when accessed directly.
recommended_action: Investigate why the dictionary key for TaxAmount is missing during the CalculateInvoiceTotals workflow. Verify the input data for invoice INV-98774 to ensure all required fields, especially TaxAmount, are present and correctly formatted. Update the bot to handle the missing key gracefully by adding a null/key guard before accessing TaxAmount from SpecificContent.
